Large language models (LLMs)

In this paper we explore the uses and limitations of LLMs for researchers and
practitioners who aim to understand consumer preferences.

concepts.finding:
First, we show that estimates of willingness-to-pay for products and features derived from
LLM responses are sometimes comparable to estimates from human studies, but are often
inaccurate and in some cases wrong-signed.
